gates.title: Deep Sleep wrapper stops before watermark advancement when a phase fails
evidence_required: nexo-deep-sleep.sh exits non-zero on extraction, synthesis, application, and audit phase failures
The wrapper does not copy extraction output as a fake synthesis fallback

gates.title: Sleep-mode synthesis gets complete learning context or reports degraded health
evidence_required: nexo-sleep.py writes a full learning dump and chunked context files
Stage B validates learning coverage metadata before marking complete
Startup surfaces sleep health warnings when synthesis fails

gates.title: Deep Sleep synthesis creates a compact startup packet for the next agent session
evidence_required: Startup prefers the packet before falling back to legacy synthesis text
Packet tests cover agenda, context packets, review items, and counts

gates.title: Deep Sleep generated followups include date, verification, priority, owner, and internal state
evidence_required: apply_findings.py applies defaults for missing followup governance fields
Duplicate followups are updated with missing governance metadata

gates.title: Release parity tests cannot download cognitive models
evidence_required: verify_client_parity.py sets NEXO_SKIP_COGNITIVE_MODEL_DOWNLOAD=1 for parity pytest
cognitive._core disables the reranker under the no-download flag
tests/test_cognitive.py covers the reranker-disabled path and stubs reranking in search ranking unit tests

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.2
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.30.2
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.2
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.2 contract before tag publish
